nasb.text: And Ishmael his son was thirteen years old when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

esv.text: And Ishmael his son was thirteen years old when he was circumcised in the flesh of his foreskin.

cnv.text: 他的兒子以實瑪利十三歲的時候，割去了他身上的包皮。

ccb.text: 他的儿子以实玛利接受割礼的时候十三岁。

csbs.text: 他的儿子以实玛利割去肉体上的包皮时年十三岁。
